issues.message: Adverb "quickly" weakens your writing. Consider a stronger verb.
issues.suggestion: Use a stronger verb like "sprinted" instead of "ran quickly".

issues.message: Passive voice: "was pushed". Use active voice.
issues.suggestion: Rewrite so the subject performs the action (e.g. "He threw the ball").
Remove the qualifier or rephrase for confidence.

issues.message: Complex word "utilize" has a simpler alternative.
